domain: Persian ney reed flute (نى) 9-segment cane-flute tradition: 4-register hierarchy bam (fundamental) + zir (octave) + geesh (octave+5th) + pas-geesh (2 octaves); interdental teeth-grip + tongue air-direction (Turkoman late-1700s); embouchure micro-adjustment + breath velocity selects which overblown harmonic dominates; brief null-pressure gate during register-transitions; partial-hole covering yields quarter-tones between registers
specific_mechanism: NEY-4-REGISTER-NULL-GATE-OVERBLOW-PROJECTION: per-task gradient null-space projection with (1) 4-register hierarchical nested null-spaces N_bam ⊂ N_zir ⊂ N_geesh ⊂ N_pasgeesh: each higher register is a strict subspace refinement of the lower; new task gradient projected onto the lowest still-permitted null-space; (2) register-transition null-gate G_trans: when projection magnitude exceeds register's threshold τ_R, force transition to next-higher register (analogous to neyzen overblowing); a brief null-update step (zero update at step k_trans) is enforced during transition to mimic null-pressure gate; (3) breath-velocity scheduler v_breath: training-step LR proportional to gradient projection magnitude; high-velocity = higher-register; (4) partial-hole quarter-tone interpolation: between registers, allow fractional projection onto 0.5-weighted-sum subspace P_part = α·N_R + (1-α)·N_{R+1} for quarter-tone task interpolation; (5) interdental embouchure soft-threshold τ_emb on gradient norm: only |∇| > τ_emb activates projection. Differs from R478 + R491 + R503 DOINA-NULL-SPACE-LORA-MELISMA-RUBATO (continuous-time melisma + breath-budget global constraint + descending-tonic basin + parlando rubato α-modulation per batch position, no 4-register hierarchical + no register-transition null-gate + no partial-hole quarter-tone) by 4-register hierarchical nested + register-transition null-gate + breath-velocity LR + partial-hole quarter-tone fractional + interdental embouchure soft-threshold.
llm_application: NEY-4-REGISTER-NULL-GATE-OVERBLOW-PROJECTION per-task gradient null-space projection with 4-register hierarchical nested null-spaces N_bam ⊂ N_zir ⊂ N_geesh ⊂ N_pasgeesh + register-transition null-gate G_trans zero-update + breath-velocity scheduler v_breath LR ∝ projection magnitude + partial-hole quarter-tone fractional projection 0.5-weighted-sum subspace + interdental embouchure soft-threshold τ_emb. Differs from R414. R427. R441. R453. R469. R478. R491. R503 DOINA-NULL-SPACE-LORA-MELISMA-RUBATO (closest — continuous-time melisma + breath-budget + descending-tonic basin + parlando rubato). Differs from GNSP + GORP + Continual Gradient Projection + SubTrack++ by 4-register hierarchical + null-gate zero-update + partial-hole quarter-tone + interdental threshold. Differs by 4-REGISTER HIERARCHICAL NESTED NULL-SPACES + REGISTER-TRANSITION NULL-GATE + BREATH-VELOCITY LR SCHEDULER + PARTIAL-HOLE QUARTER-TONE FRACTIONAL + INTERDENTAL SOFT-THRESHOLD.
novelty_claim: GNSP Gradient Null-Space Projection 2507.19839 + GORP 2507.02503 + Continual Gradient Low-Rank Projection ACL 2025 + SubTrack++ Subspace Tracking cover gradient null-space + continual-learning subspace mitigation space. NEY-4-REGISTER-NULL-GATE-OVERBLOW-PROJECTION adds (a) 4-register hierarchical nested null-spaces + (b) register-transition null-gate zero-update + (c) breath-velocity LR scheduler + (d) partial-hole quarter-tone fractional projection + (e) interdental embouchure soft-threshold. Recombination — borderline lookup.
